title: Assistant message with code, HTML, and SVG artifacts

messages.content: Create a bar chart showing sales data — give me the Python code, an HTML page to display it, and an SVG version.

content.text: Here are all three versions of the bar chart:

artifacts.title: bar_chart.py
artifacts.content:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

sales = {'Q1': 120, 'Q2': 185, 'Q3': 160, 'Q4': 210}
plt.bar(sales.keys(), sales.values())
plt.title('Quarterly Sales')
plt.ylabel('Units')
plt.savefig('chart.png')

artifacts.title: bar_chart.svg
artifacts.content: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="300" height="220"><rect x="10" y="80" width="40" height="120" fill="steelblue"/><rect x="70" y="35" width="40" height="165" fill="steelblue"/><rect x="130" y="60" width="40" height="140" fill="steelblue"/><rect x="190" y="10" width="40" height="190" fill="steelblue"/></svg>
